doc:
playbash run <target> <playbook> [args...]
  <target>:  host, group, all, @self
  <playbook>: name (resolves to playbash-<name>) or path (slash → file)

playbash run @self daily --report          — local maintenance + machine-readable summary
playbash run all weekly                    — fan out to inventory
playbash run somehost dev-docs/setup.sh    — ad-hoc script (auto-pushed)

desc: Execute an inline command across hosts
doc:
playbash exec <target> -- <cmd> [args...]
playbash exec all -- uname -a
playbash exec all --sudo -- apt list --upgradable

desc: Push a playbook script to host(s) without running it

doc:
playbash put <target> <local> [<remote>]
playbash put all ~/.env :        — to $HOME on every host
playbash put all ~/.env :{host}.env  — per-host filename
playbash put all -- /etc/foo.conf --sudo  — needs sudo on remote

desc: Local daily maintenance with machine-readable report
